title: Other Gods
description: New biom, mobs, tools and armors inspired by Lovecraft horrors
body:
Adds new mobs, new biome, statues of ancient gods(only one for now), magic, tools and armors!
Mass Armor and tools, Elder Armor and tools (very strong, but not so easy to craft) also Elder sword and pickaxe for use need A LOT amount food. Biom of Mass - just like the plains, but with quite unpleasant mobs. Ghul and Shogoth, Ghul similar to a zombie, Shogoth tanky and strong monster but he drop Mass with which crafts a lot of items. Elder Mass can be found in monolith structure on chest. (You need a lot of traveling).
